steps.title: Eliminate the constant term
steps.content:
Subtract the second equation from the first to eliminate the $wy$ term.
$$(-x-wy)-(2x-wy)=-357-102$$
$$-3x=-459$$
$$x=153$$

steps.title: Use the intersection point
steps.content: The graphs intersect at $(q,17)$, so use $x=153$ and $y=17$ in the first equation. $$-153-17w=-357$$ $$-17w=-204$$ $$w=12$$ The answer is 12.
